item.TDLINE: <N>,, ABG: (if Yes fomat to be attached): &WA_ZCOMM-CR_5(C)&</>
<N> PBG: (if Yes fomat to be attached): &WA_ZCOMM-CR_6(C)&</>
<N>a) Supply of goods against licenses issued under the Duty exemption
<N>b) Supply of goods to Units located in Export Processing Zones(EPZs)
or Software Technology Parks(STPs) or Electronic Hardware Technology
<N>c) Supply of Capital goods to holders of licenses issued under the
<N>d) Supply of goods to Projects financed by Multilateral or Bilateral
agencies/funs as notified by the Department of Economic Affaris,
Ministry of Finance under international competitive bidding under
limited tender system in accordance with the procedure of those
agencies/funds, where the legal agreements provide for tender evaluation
<N>e) Supply of capital goods and spares to ferilizer plants if the
<N> On Customer account but prepaid and claimed by us:
<N> ( In case pre-paid & claimed: to be include in invoice or to
<N> On our account: &WA_ZCOMM-CR_19(C)& / On customer account
<N>,,Transporter: instead of reliable pls. specify name of transporter.
<N>,,Road Permit: &WA_ZCOMM-CR_31(C)& ( if Yes required at the time of
&WA_ZCOMM-CR_33_TEXT(C)&% Per week and Maximum to the extent of
then &WA_ZCOMM-CR_37_TEXT(C)&% of basic order value or Rs. Per Valve)</>
<N>,,Commission payable to/to be adjusted against credit note:
